snippets.title: A basic decorator with functools.wraps
snippets.explanation: The wrapper forwards *args/**kwargs; functools.wraps keeps the original name and docstring.

snippets.title: A parametrized decorator: @retry(times=...)
snippets.explanation: An outer function takes the arguments and returns the actual decorator (three nested layers).

snippets.title: Caching with functools.lru_cache
snippets.explanation: lru_cache memoizes results keyed by arguments; only pure functions with hashable args should use it.

snippets.title: Registering tools via a decorator
snippets.explanation: A decorator can have a side effect (registration) and return the function unchanged so frameworks can discover it.
